SCALING
Welcome to the SCALING module.
Once you've setup your foundations, run testing and optimisation, you're ready to scale. This
module is once you're consistently seeing good results, whether you're spending $50/d or
$1000/d consistently, knowing you have a good audience and ads is important to scaling.
Some teach to throw money at it, and you might be inclined to test and scale that way but
my approach is based on maintaining as much profitability as you can through the whole
process.
> Introduction To Scaling - Whilst I cover off scaling strategies, this is an important part of
scaling by helping you understand how the auction works. My time spent Day Trading
currencies has helped me better understand the auction and how scaling works, covering
the Campaign Objectives and why/when/how to use them, mindset training to help move you
from irrational to data-driven decision making, together with risk-tolerance and introducing
the scaling strategies I deploy.
Level: Intermediate / Advanced
> Scaling Strategies: The CBO Method - My go-to Scaling strategy of 2019. In essence
taking Graduation Testing through V-Scaling then moving to a Campaign Budget Optimised
campaign instead of H-Scaling... THEN H-Scaling where you see profitable segments. It's
awesome!
Level: Intermediate
> Scaling Strategies: V-Scaling - The most basic form of scaling, which is increasing your
spend by no more than 30% per day. I provide a demo of how I do this and what to look out
for.
Level: Intermediate
> Scaling Strategies: H-Scaling - A more advanced form of scaling, which offers faster
scaling with higher risk. Designed for those that are fully on top of metrics and analysis, able
to take quick decisions and looking for faster growth than the V-Scaling route including a
demo of conducting this for a client that required fast growth to $5k spend per day from zero
within 30 days. Warning: the rules changed in 2018 so use this with caution!
Level: Advanced
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
